message:
✨ Add GA4 product telemetry with opt-out (#1255)

Add anonymous Google Analytics 4 telemetry to track product usage
patterns and improve user experience. All data is anonymous (no PII)
and users can opt out via Settings > Analytics.

- Create analytics.ts core module with gtag.js integration
- Track page views, card lifecycle, AI missions, auth, tour,
  marketplace, feedback, errors, and GitHub token events
- Add AnalyticsSection settings toggle with privacy notice
- Measurement ID via VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID env var (no hardcoded IDs)
- Safe no-op when measurement ID is not configured

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+// Track page views in Google Analytics on route change
+function PageViewTracker() {
+  const location = useLocation()
+  useEffect(() => {
+    trackPageView(location.pathname)
+  }, [location.pathname])
+  return null
+}
